request.prompt: Use the reference character: Frieren chibi pixel sprite. Horizontal 8-frame sprite sheet for track-switch casting. Same full-body height every frame, same foot baseline, same camera. Action: stand, small side turn, hold staff diagonally across body, point staff forward, short chant pose, return to stand. The staff must never rise above the hair. No large effects, no particles, no zoom, no tiny frame, no text, no border. Solid pure #FF00FF background.
